2161190.name: Multiverse Mercenaries
2161190.description:
Gameplay

  • Navigate, Explore, and Conquer 4 procedurally generated levels
  • Hop between the Multiverses where you will find vastly different environments from a cyberpunk club to a wild savannah.
  • Dominate your foes as Akuma, a world-class assassin yearning for revenge, or TR-7, a state-of-the-art machine who has gone rouge
  • Obliterate enemies to earn money and safely clear a path to a portal transferring you to another universe
  • Purchase 22 different stackable items that turn your mercenary into a force to be reckoned with
  • Die.Reset.Repeat.

What to expect currently

  • 4 procedurally levels that will NEVER be the same
  • 2 characters with 3 unique abilities each in attack and movement
  • 4 different enemies that play different roles and attack in different ways
  • 22 items with 3 rarities that not only effect you but also effect the world and enemies
  • 4 unique tracks. 1 for each level
  • A game designed in pixel art

What to expect in the future

  • 1-2 more characters
  • 2-3 more levels including a final boss stage
  • 3-4 more enemies
  • 6-8 more items
  • A more prevalent story within the game
  • Bug fixing and gameplay tweaks
  • Mac OS support

About the devs

  • Made by me, Matthew Diamond. I am a 17-year-old high school senior making a passion project in conjunction with Curios Cardinals
  • Curios Cardinals is a start-up company that sets up students with college-age students to work on passion projects
  • We hope you enjoy! We really appreciate you playing our game. Please leave feedback! Feel free to reach out to our email or our Twitter!

NOTE: MULTIVERSE MERCENARIES DOES NOT WORK ON MAC YET MAC VERSION WILL BE UP IN ABOUT A WEEK
2161190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
